sourceTitle: geoBoundaries Syrian Arab Republic Administrative Boundaries

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-districts/geoboundaries-syr-adm2-api.json
rawFiles.notes: geoBoundaries API metadata for Syria ADM2 gbOpen.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-districts/geoboundaries-syr-adm2.geojson
rawFiles.notes: Syria ADM2 boundary GeoJSON downloaded from geoBoundaries.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-districts/geoboundaries-syr-adm2-derived-areas-and-matches.json
rawFiles.notes: Local point-in-polygon matches between GeoNames ADM2 coordinates and geoBoundaries ADM2 polygons, with derived area values.

transforms: Downloaded geoBoundaries Syria ADM2 API metadata and boundary GeoJSON.
Matched each GeoNames ADM2 record to exactly one geoBoundaries ADM2 polygon using the GeoNames representative coordinate.
Calculated polygon area from GeoJSON coordinates with a spherical polygon area formula using mean Earth radius 6371008.8 metres.
Rounded derived district areas to three decimal places in square kilometres.
Stored geoBoundaries shape IDs as external identifiers.
reviewNotes: Used geoBoundaries for ADM2 shape IDs and derived area values. The current seed does not publish geometry files; GeoJSON generation remains blocked until geometry and boundary release policy is finalized.
